info.name: Web Sankul API
info.description:
Auto-generated from src/**/*.routes.ts. Body schemas are resolved from Zod validation files; query/path params are inferred from controller usage. All requests carry a Bearer token (project rule: every route requires auth).

Variables: `baseUrl`, `adminToken`, `clientToken`, `educatorToken`, `promoterToken`.
Set `baseUrl` (e.g. http://localhost:4001) and the relevant token, then any folder is ready to fire.
